# Buyer ActivationProgram
## Reach HR Leaders with a fully managed email solution with the industry's most impactful and effective lead nurturing program
Download Media Planner
### What Does Our Buyer Activation Program Offer?
To stand out in an increasingly crowded and competitive HR market, you need to ensure YOUR message is reaching the BEST audience. That's where our Buyer Activation Program comes in. We offer a fully managed solution that provides you with access to the most highly qualified, opted-in and targeted list of global decision makers in the HR space. Our team will work with you to customize your messaging and identify your target audience to find the right prospects to help grow your business.
Buyer Activation Program
### With HR.com's Buyer Activation Program You Can:
* Help your business build brand awareness and website traffic
* Segment our database to ensure the right message is reaching the right audience
* Access one of the most cost-effective email lists in the industry (less than 2.5 cents/name)
* Identify your ideal buyer and engage with them on a variety of mediums
* Analyze results within 48 hours - fine-tune your message, and maximize performance
Buyer Activation Program 02
### Messaging Sent Through Our Buyer Activation Program:
* Share thought leadership and receive the full contact information from the people who downloaded the assets
* Drive attendance to a customer event
* Poll HR managers on specific topics
* Promote webcasts/assets on other platforms
* Personalized email by sales representative
Buyer Activation Program 03
### The Buyer Activation Program Steps for Success
Meet Your New Marketing Guru and Team Member#### Meet Your New Marketing Guru and Team Member
A dedicated HR.com expert is assigned to your account to ensure your success. This person will work with you every step of the way, incorporating our proven practices and email marketing expertise.
Analytic Campaign Reporting#### Analytic Campaign Reporting
Receive reports of your Open Rate, Click-through rates and a list of leads generated from your email campaigns within 24-72 hours after the email is delivered to users.
A/B Testing#### A/B Testing
Unsure about your email subject line, design, or content? We can test different versions to specific lists to see which message resonates the best.
Choose Your Target Audience#### Choose Your Target Audience
We will provide you with lists containing

results.title: HR Technology Buyer's Guide: Critical Signals Vendors Must Demonstrate in AI - H3 HR Advisors
results.text:
HR Technology Buyer's Guide: Critical Signals Vendors Must Demonstrate in AI - H3 HR Advisors Skip to content

# HR Technology Buyer’s Guide: Critical Signals Vendors Must Demonstrate in AI

Important points to remember when reviewing potential HR platforms with AI while ensuring it aligns with your organization’s values, needs, and financial objectives.

In 2026, buyers must evaluate not only what a product does, but how it learns, how it behaves, how it protects people, and how it evolves. These categories represent the critical signals that indicate whether a vendor is mature, trustworthy, and ready for enterprise‑grade AI deployment.

Download now:

HR Technology Buyer’s Guide: Critical Signals Vendors Must Demonstrate in AI

results.title: HR.com
results.author: Exa
results.text:
# HR.com (HR.COM Limited)

HR.com is a Human Resources Services company. HR.com is the largest community of HR Pros offering HR training, Webcasts, Events, HR compliance, HR certification, HRCI & SHRM cert prep, HR Research, HR Tools & Resources. HR.com employs 165 people (-4.3% YoY, -13 people) and has an annual revenue of $14.0M, founded in 1999. Headquartered in Canada, operates in 12 countries (including United States, India, Philippines, Pakistan, and United Kingdom).

## About
About HR.com

HR.com, the largest network of HR professionals, is committed to helping HR professionals advance and build meaningful careers and find the optimal solutions to enhance their job performance. 

With products and resources rooted in education, research, and leveraging cutting-edge technology, we help at every career stage - and over 2 million HR pros agree! (How could that many people be wrong?) By delivering best-in-class learning products, 500+ annual webcasts, 50+ world-class events, monthly HR-themed magazines, and innovative and thought-provoking research through the HR Research Institute, HR.com strives to inspire and strengthen workforces to change the world. 

HR.com also offers the most comprehensive HR certification exam preparation and guarantees a passing score on all SHRM and HRCI certification exams. Technology and experience drive our customized solutions that will help you become the best and most successful version of yourself. Learn more at www.HR.com and maximize your potential.

## Company Details
- Industry: Human Resources Services
- Type: Privately Held
- Founded Year: 1999
- Homepage: hr.com
- Status: active
- Ownership: Private
- Aliases: hr.com, hr.com limited
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/company/hr-com
- Linkedin Followers: 66,344 (Monthly: +0.3%, Yearly: +2.6%)
- Emails: info@hr.com
- Phone: 877-472-6648, +1 905 727 1340
- SIC Codes: 27, 274
- NAICS Codes: 51, 519

## Financials
- Annual Revenue: USD 14,000,000

## Workforce
- Employees: 165 (51-200 employees)
 - Monthly Growth: -0.7%
 - Yearly Growth: -4.3%
- Key Executives:
 - Amy Niras: Regional Sales Director
 - Sharilene Rowland: Account Partner
 - Pamela Koller: Regional Sales Director
 - Sharilene Rowland: HR Business Partner
 - Mohammad Abdi: Human Resources Business Partner

 - Rose Donato: Regional Account Director
- Breakdown:
 - By Country: United States: 61 (21%), Canada: 53 (18%), India: 36 (12%), Philippines: 4 (1%), Pakistan: 3 (1%), United Kingdom: 2 (1%) (+6 more)
 - By Department: Other Department: 79 (27%), General Management: 20 (7%), Sales: 12 (4%), Technical: 10 (3%), Hr: 9 (3%), Research: 9 (3%), Marketing: 8 (3%), Consulting: 6 (2%), Customer Service: 5 (2%), Product: 4 (1%) (+5 more)
 - By Seniority: Specialist: 84 (29%), Other Management: 64 (22%), Manager: 13 (4%), Director: 3 (1%), Partner: 2 (1%), Senior: 2 (1%), Vp: 2 (1%) (+1 more)
- Salary Ranges:
 - Genome Analyst: INR 350,000/year
 - Product Manager: CAD 45,368/year

results.title: ATD Austin
results.author: Exa
results.text:
# ATD Austin (Association for Talent Development Austin Chapter)

ATD Austin is a Non-profit Organizations company. Uta Milewski Immobilien is a company that specializes in the buying, selling, and renting of real estate, houses, and apartments. ATD Austin employs 5 people (-12.5% YoY, -1 person), founded in 1976. Headquartered in Austin, Texas, United States.

## About
The ATD Austin chapter, the local affiliated chapter for the international ATD organization, is a leading local professional association that brings excellence to workplace learning and performance improvement. The non-profit Austin Chapter serves local professionals by providing learning and networking opportunities to achieve exceptional levels of individual and organizational performance. Members include HR and Learning & Development professionals from a variety of industries, independent consultants and vendor suppliers to the talent development profession.

## Company Details
- Industry: Non-profit Organizations
- Type: Nonprofit
- Headquarters: Austin, United States
- Founded Year: 1976
- Homepage: tdaustin.org
- Status: active
